## koem-cli get labels

Get labels and their port ranges

### Synopsis

Display all configured labels with their port ranges in a tabular format.

```
koem-cli get labels [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help           help for labels
  -l, --label string   Filter by label name
```
